memory:memory/2026-04-06.md:1:39.snippet: # 2026-04-06 — Late Session ## Linux System Monitor Skill — v1 Complete ### What was built A new OpenClaw skill `linux-system-monitor` was created to run periodic Linux system monitoring across Hebei (Ubuntu 24.04) and XavierNV (Jetson/Xavier, aarch64). **Skill location:** `~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/linux-system-monitor/` **Key scripts:** - `collect-metrics.sh` — gathers CPU, memory, disk, network, TCP, processes, services, security (SSH/sudo failures, logins), NTP, and temperature metrics; emits JSON - `parse-report.py` — applies threshold rules, emits human-readable digest, writes annotated snapshots to disk, appends alerts to daily log - `run-monitor.sh` — orchestrator; reads
